phrases.intent_en: Ask where to sit for dinner
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde podemos sentarnos para cenar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh poh-DOH-mohs sehn-TAHR-nohs PAH-rah teh-NAHR?

likely_response.local: Junto a la barra de jamón, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH BAHR-rah DEH hah-MÓN AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: In the main room, at the back.

responses.english: In the main room, at the back.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH BAHR-rah DEH hah-MÓN AHL FOHN-doh
responses.local: Junto a la barra de jamón, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the wine list
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver la carta de vinos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh vehr lah KAHR-tah deh BEE-nohs

likely_response.local: En la barra, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH BAHR-rah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the bar, on the right.

responses.english: At the bar, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH BAHR-rah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la barra, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if English menu is available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿disponen de menú en inglés?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, dis-PO-nen deh meh-NOO en een-GLES?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is indicated at the entrance.

responses.english: Yes, it is indicated at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bar area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la zona de barra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh es-TAH lah SOH-nah deh BAH-rrah?

likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the left.

responses.english: At the back, on the left.
